title: I was making a repo for both project folders for m...

message.text:
I was making a repo for both project folders for my RC car project. Here is what I did in the terminal below. I'm trying to push it into my github but it won't create a repo. Can you check what I did wrong?

mongoose@mongoose:~$ cd /home/mongoose/Desktop/STM32_Workspace/RC_Car_Mark_I/
mongoose@mongoose:~/Desktop/STM32_Workspace/RC_Car_Mark_I$ git init
hint: Using 'master' as the name for the initial branch. This default branch name
hint: is subject to change. To configure the initial branch name to use in all
hint: of your new repositories, which will suppress this warning, call:
hint:
hint:   git config --global init.defaultBranch <name>
hint:
hint: Names commonly chosen instead of 'master' are 'main', 'trunk' and
hint: 'development'. The just-created branch can be renamed via this command:
hint:
hint:   git branch -m <name>
Initialized empty Git repository in /home/mongoose/STM32CubeIDE/workspace_1.19.0/RC_Car_Mark_I/.git/
mongoose@mongoose:~/Desktop/STM32_Workspace/RC_Car_Mark_I$ ls
rc_car_integrated_II  RC_Car_Transmitter_L432KC
mongoose@mongoose:~/Desktop/STM32_Workspace/RC_Car_Mark_I$ git status
On branch master

No commits yet

Untracked files:
  (use "git add <file>..." to include in what will be committed)
        .metadata/
        RC_Car_Transmitter_L432KC/
        rc_car_integrated_II/

nothing added to commit but untracked files present (use "git add" to track)
mongoose@mongoose:~/Desktop/STM32_Workspace/RC_Car_Mark_I$ git add .

hint: Clones of the outer repository will not contain the contents of
hint: the embedded repository and will not know how to obtain it.
hint: If you meant to add a submodule, use:
hint:
hint:   git submodule add <url> rc_car_integrated_II
hint:

hint: index with:
hint:

hint:
